summary: Added emergencyCancelAll() to LPVault.sol — any position holder can force-close all positions after EMERGENCY_CANCEL_TIMELOCK (7 days) of operator silence. Iterates all positions, computes principal (liquidity * rangeWidth / PRECISION) + accrued fees (v3 feeGrowthInside accumulator), distributes USDC to each owner, zeroes all positions, sets activeLiquidity=0, transitions phase to Cancelled(3). Also added lastOperatorActivityTimestamp reset to notifyFees and phase==3 guards to collect, reclaimDeposit, and notifyFees. Initialized lastOperatorActivityTimestamp in initialize() to prevent premature timelock on new vaults. 24 integration tests cover all 6 scenarios.
